headlines.title: U.S. plan to open Ebola quarantine center in Kenya faces growing backlash and protests
headlines.description: Plans for Americans exposed to Ebola to be quarantined abroad faced mounting backlash Tuesday, with Kenya’s president defending a proposed 50-bed facility in the country after violent protests

headlines.title: Around 1 in 5 young people use AI chatbots for mental health advice, survey finds
headlines.description: Nearly 1 in 5 adolescents and young adults are turning to AI chatbots for advice when they’re sad, angry, nervous or stressed, according to a new study.

headlines.title: GLP-1 overdoses increase at an alarming rate as weight loss drugs become easier to buy online
headlines.description: Within 24 hours of injecting the first dose of a weight loss medication she received following a visit with a telehealth doctor, Karleigh McClain was admitted to the hospital, she said

headlines.title: Good news: You don’t need surgery. But you’ll have to apply maggots to your wound.
headlines.description: The lowly maggot gets a bad rap, mostly known for feeding on corpses and rotting meat.

headlines.title: How to Advocate for Yourself at the Doctor's Office
headlines.description: Medical appointments can be intimidating so NBC News medical reporter Dr. Akshay Syal joins TODAY to share key tips for being your own best advocate and ensuring your concerns are heard. He gives tips for how to prepare for an appointment like writing down questions, highlights common mistakes like waiting too long to speak up, and more.

headlines.title: Protests erupt over U.S. Ebola quarantine center in Kenya
headlines.description: Hundreds of people gathered in Nanyuki, Kenya, to protest a U.S.-proposed Ebola quarantine center for American citizens exposed to the virus. Kenya does not have any suspected Ebola cases, but neighboring Uganda has reported nine and closed its border with the Democratic Republic of Congo.

headlines.title: Breakthrough treatment for pancreatic cancer
headlines.description: There’s a major medical breakthrough for pancreatic cancer - one of the deadliest cancers - which could double survival rates. And the treatment could potentially be used against other types of cancer, like colon, ovarian and lung. NBC News’ Anne Thompson explains.

headlines.title: Kick Off Summer 2026 Strong With Start TODAY’s Strength Plan
headlines.description: TODAY fitness contributor Stephanie Mansour and nutrition and health expert Joy Bauer stop by Studio 1A to break down June’s Start TODAY 30-day strength plan to kick off your summer strong and confident. They show effective strength training moves and explain how the plan can improve brain health and boost your mood.

headlines.title: Is the Forme Power Bra really worth $179?
headlines.description: I tested the Forme Power Bra for five months to see if it could improve my posture and back support. Here’s what actually happened.

headlines.title: The best running watches, tested over hundreds of miles
headlines.description: I’ve tested dozens of running watches from Garmin, Coros, Amazfit, Fitbit, Apple and more. Here are my top picks for beginners, races and ultra-athletes alike.

headlines.title: The best men’s walking shoes of 2026, tested and reviewed
headlines.description: Shop expert-recommended and staff-tested men’s walking shoes from Brooks, On, New Balance and Hoka.

headlines.title: I’ve tested dozens of workout headphones: These are the best
headlines.description: I tested over a dozen workout headphones from brands like Apple, Beats, and Shokz to find our top picks for running, biking, the gym and more.
